'''Attiera''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], the mother of [[Froera]] and a member of the [[Myyydril]] tribe.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Attiera was a non-player character in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{C|Cut content}}
